body:
## Problem
`/cards` is a live page with SSR meta handler in `api/meta/index.js:273`:
```js
if (path === '/cards') {
  title: 'Metal Drummer Gear Cards | MetalForge'
  description: 'Beautiful shareable gear cards for every drummer. Download and share on Instagram, Twitter, and more!'
  ...
}
```

But `api/sitemap.js` has **zero entries for `/cards`** (confirmed: `grep "cards" api/sitemap.js` returns 0 URL entries — only sitemap comment at line 341 contains "cards").

Same bug class as #1789 (/stats hub) and #1801 (/beginner-guide) — page exists with SSR meta but is invisible to Google via sitemap.

## Target queries
- "metal drummer gear cards"
- "drum kit info card"
- "download drummer gear card"
- Social sharing use case: linked content indexed = brand awareness queries

## Fix (one line in api/sitemap.js)
```js
{ loc: '/cards', priority: '0.6', changefreq: 'monthly' },
```
Add near other utility/tool pages (around line 440–445).

## Bonus (optional in same PR)
Check `api/meta/index.js:273` — if `/cards` SSR handler returns no `articleSchema`, add `CollectionPage` or `WebApplication` JSON-LD (the page generates card images for every drummer, making it a tool/collection).

## Verify
1. `grep "'/cards'" api/sitemap.js` — returns the new entry
2. Sitemap XML includes `/cards` URL
3. `curl -s "https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/cards"` — returns correct title/description
4. Google Search Console URL Inspection on `/cards` — page is crawlable
5. Schema check: if JSON-LD added, no errors in Rich Results Test

## Done
`/cards` appears in `api/sitemap.js` with priority 0.6.
title: SEO: /cards page — add to sitemap.js (shareable gear cards, SSR meta exists, zero crawl discoverability)
notes: Fix was already applied: api/sitemap.js line 451-452 has { loc: '/cards', priority: '0.6', changefreq: 'monthly' }. api/meta/index.js line 319-336 has /cards handler with CollectionPage JSON-LD schema. Both files pass node --check syntax validation.
